title: Create a New Eraser File with Diagram
description: Example of creating a new Eraser file with a document and embedded flow chart diagram

body.title: System Architecture Overview
body.document:
# System Architecture

This document describes the high-level architecture of our system.

```flowchart-diagram
User -> LoadBalancer
LoadBalancer -> WebServer1
LoadBalancer -> WebServer2
WebServer1 -> Database
WebServer2 -> Database
Database -> Cache
```
